title: Race Condition — TOCTOU
description: CouponStore checks coupon.used then sleeps then increments. Concurrent /redeem calls all pass the check before any increment lands. Bank enough credits to buy the flag.

hints.text: The coupon is single-use *if* checked sequentially. Fire ~12 concurrent /redeem requests with the same session cookie and watch the balance.
curl can run in parallel via xargs -P. Save your sid cookie from / and reuse it across the burst.
